question: Is the headquarters of the current owner of HS235 located in the same city as the official primary residence of the British monarch?

chain.fact: GSK acquired the drug HS235 from 35Pharma.
The official primary residence of the British monarch is Buckingham Palace.
Buckingham Palace is located in London.

article_title: GSK to buy 35Pharma, picking up lung disease drug
event_title: Which companies will be acquired before 2027?
